mapper.select: SELECT limit_id, line_id, daily_data_limit, is_daily_limit_active, shared_data_limit, is_shared_limit_active, created_at, deleted_at, updated_at FROM LINE_LIMIT WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL;

SELECT limit_id, line_id, daily_data_limit, is_daily_limit_active, shared_data_limit, is_shared_limit_active, created_at, deleted_at, updated_at FROM LINE_LIMIT WHERE limit_id = #{limitId} AND deleted_at IS NULL;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LINE_LIMIT (line_id, daily_data_limit, is_daily_limit_active, shared_data_limit, is_shared_limit_active, created_at) VALUES (#{lineId}, #{dailyDataLimit}, #{isDailyLimitActive}, #{sharedDataLimit}, #{isSharedLimitActive}, now());
